codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior failure by adding a dedicated, reviewable commit with focused parser regression coverage for the already-landed project/tag/client resource surfaces. Combined with the pre-existing command tests and list command unit tests, the reviewed evidence now covers the promised resource-first list/create/rename/delete and representative --json behavior.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the failed original feature and the fix together: the original handoff still points at unrelated entry-surface commit 5627432, but the fix commit 56ba00d adds the missing scrutiny-reviewable evidence via nine focused parser regression tests in src/arguments.rs. Those new tests cover project/tag/client list --json, rename, and delete parsing, while existing tests in src/commands/create_*.rs, rename_*.rs, delete_*.rs, and list.rs already cover create flows and representative JSON list behavior, so the fix adequately closes the original evidence gap without widening scope.
